connect.description: Connect to the jambonz SBC via WebSocket and register as a SIP endpoint. Resolves when registered (if autoRegister is true) or connected. Throws ConnectionError or RegistrationError on failure.

disconnect.description: Disconnect from the SBC, unregister SIP, and clean up all resources. Call this on component unmount or page unload.

register.description: Manually send SIP REGISTER. Only needed when autoRegister is false.

unregister.description: Remove SIP registration without disconnecting the WebSocket.

call.description: Make an outbound call to a phone number or SIP URI. Returns the JambonzCall instance immediately (before the call connects).

callUser.description: Call another registered SIP user by username.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: SIP username of the target user

callQueue.description: Join a call queue. Internally dials 'queue-{name}'.

parameters.name: queueName
parameters.description: Name of the queue to join

callConference.description: Join a conference room. Internally dials 'conference-{name}'.

parameters.name: conferenceName
parameters.description: Name of the conference to join

callApplication.description: Call a jambonz application by its SID. Sets X-Application-Sid header on the INVITE.

sendMessage.description: Send a SIP MESSAGE (text message) to a target.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: SIP URI or phone number of the recipient
